params.minProvisionTokens: Minimum GRT stake required. Pass 0 to use the protocol default.

setPaymentsDestination(address).details: Defaults to serviceProvider at registration. Allows separation of      operator key (used for signing) from payment wallet (cold storage etc.).      Takes effect on the next collect() call.

addChain(uint256,uint256).notice: Add a chain to the supported set.

removeChain(uint256).notice: Remove a chain from the supported set. Existing registrations are unaffected         until providers call stopService.

setDefaultMinProvision(uint256).notice: Update the default minimum provision tokens.

setPaymentsDestination(address).notice: Update the address that receives collected GRT fees.
